utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Get Out !

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Ross , can I talk to you for a minute ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes , please ! So , what going on ?

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Uh , well ... Joey and I broke up .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh my God , wh ... what happened ?

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Joey is a great guy , but we are just ... so different ! I mean , during your speech he kept laughing at homo erectus !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I knew that was him !

emotion_cause.span: 6_during your speech he kept laughing at homo erectus !

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Anyway I just , uh , I think it is for the best .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , you ok ?

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: I guess .

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: There was hum ... there was another reason that I thought it was time to end it with Joey .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I started to realize that I was having feelings for someone else .

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: I started to realize that I was having feelings for someone else .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I started to realize that I was having feelings for someone else .

utterances.speaker: Paleontologist
utterances.text: Ok Geller . Last day of the conference , you know what happens to the keynote speaker .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , professor Clerk we are kind of in the middle of a conversation , here .

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Yeah , can you guys just throw him in the pool later ?

utterances.speaker: Professore Clerk
utterances.text: Or we could throw you both in now !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ok , gentlemen !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Please !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Are not we a little old for this ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , we are scientists , right ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: We are academics .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And most importantly I ... you ... you will have to catch us first .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: GO , GO , GO !
